candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label and best match for total revenue/sales.
Revenue-related but clearly only a component/other revenue, not total top-line.

variables.notes: Selected the clear total revenue line.

Candidate list was empty. Chose 'Property related operating expenses' from the Income Statement preview because it appears to be the most likely direct cost line tied to rental/property operations, whereas 'Property Costs' is unpopulated and may be a header. Manual review needed because this issuer is property/investment focused and the boundary between direct property costs and operating overhead is not fully clear from labels alone.

candidates.why: Clear overhead component and a strong SG&A match.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Contains SG&A wording but is D&A, which should be excluded from XSGA per instructions.

variables.notes: Used candidate 'Personnel expenses' and added 'Operating expenses' from the full preview because no explicit populated SG&A total row exists and 'Operating expenses' appears to be the closest additional overhead bucket. Excluded D&A-related SG&A row per instructions. Manual review needed because 'Operating expenses' may overlap partly with direct property costs depending on issuer-specific presentation. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Operating expenses

candidates.why: Contains 'Development' and is the best candidate for R&D expense if reported within operating expenses.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: R&D-related but amortization, not current-period R&D expense; should not be primary XRD.

candidates.row_label: Central Administration and Development - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing row, not an expense line.

variables.notes: Best available R&D-related operating line. Supplemental amortization line excluded because it is amortization, not current R&D expense.

candidates.why: Best direct match for interest expense.

candidates.why: Supplemental subtype of interest expense; lower priority fallback.

candidates.why: Balancing row, should not be preferred when direct expense line exists.

Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

Also a direct balance sheet minority interest line; same values, good fallback.
